Welcome to Aviation Security Training Organisation

Welwitschia Aviation (Pty) Ltd is a juristic person incorporated in terms of the Companies Act 28 of 2004. It's a wholly owned Namibian company approved by Namibia Civil Aviation Authority (NCAA) to provide aviation security courses in Namibia. It provides aviation related training and consulting services in aviation. In particular, we offer short courses such as Avsec Instructors Course, Avsec Supervisor Course, Basic Avsec Course, Avsec Management Course, Risk Management Course, and Security Awareness amongst others.
